LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. APPLIES FOR A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT HUGO BOYE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA STELLE BISTRO. (APPLICATION, 2.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM. (CCP 484.090.) THE OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT IDENTIFIES THE ACCOUNT HOLDER AS "STELLE BISTRO", AND NOT MR. BOYE. (ABLEMAN DECL., EXHIBIT A.) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MR. BOYE DOES BUSINESS AS STELLE BISTRO. IN THE COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT MR. BOYE SIGNED A PERSONAL GUARANTY. (COMPLAINT, 14, EXHIBIT B.) HOWEVER, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT VERIFIED AS AVERRED IN THE APPLICATION. (COMPARE COMPLAINT; WITH APPLICATION, 7A, COOK DECL., P. 1:10-11.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Denied. Plaintiff Sysco San Francisco, Inc. applies for a writ of attachment against Defendant Hugo Boye, individually and dba Stelle Bistro. (Application, 2.) Plaintiff has not established the probable validity of its claim. (CCP 484.090.) The open book account identifies the account holder as "Stelle Bistro", and not Mr. Boye. (Ableman Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiff has not presented sufficient evidence to demonstrate that Mr. Boye does business as Stelle Bistro. In the Complaint, Plaintiff alleges that Mr. Boye signed a personal guaranty. (Complaint, 14, Exhibit B.) However, the Complaint is not verified as averred in the Application. (Compare Complaint; with Application, 7a, Cook Decl., p. 1:10-11.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
